nasb.text: When you sacrifice a sacrifice of thanksgiving to the Lord, you shall sacrifice it so that you may be accepted.

esv.text: And when you sacrifice a sacrifice of thanksgiving to the Lord, you shall sacrifice it so that you may be accepted.

cnv.text: 如果你們獻感恩祭給耶和華，要獻得可蒙悅納。

ccb.text: 你们献感恩祭给耶和华时，要使你们所献的蒙悦纳。
